contentList.content: Utility Spells
A little toolbox for custom non-combat spells and abilities.
WARNING: Inform yourself of the bugs related to this on the Appearance Edit Enhanced mod page!
Conjure Basket Full of Equipment
Conjure a Basket Full of Equipment into your inventory.

This spell conjures a Ghost Basket into your inventory that will disappear after 10 turns. Take your desired items out of the Ghost Basket before that. Everything left in the Ghost Basket will disappear forever.
Basket Full of Equipment Summoned
You summoned a temporary Basket Full of Equipment to your inventory. It and all its contents will disappear soon.
Toggles your veil's visuals on and off, if you have one selected from the mirror or character creation.
Blood Donor
You feel a bit woozy, though you'd feel a lot worse were the feeding involuntary.
Triage Kit

A collection of tools used for treating wounds in the field. Not as robust as an Injury Kit, lacking salves, tinctures and other important remedies, but a reliable collection of implements that stand the test of time nonetheless.
Tend Injuries

Tend to a creatures wounds, healing them. The target must wait before they can be tended to again.
This kit enables you to treat Injuries, based on a Medicine Check. The kit is not consumed on an unsuccessful attempt, though it can only be used once per day on any individual creature.
Recovering from Medical Attention
The Triage Kit has been used on you today, your body must rest and recover before it can be used again.
The wearer can use <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Help">Help</LSTag> as a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="BonusActionPoint">Bonus Action</LSTag>.

The wearer can use <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Help">Help</LSTag> as a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="BonusActionPoint">Bonus Action</LSTag> and they and their allies within [1] gain <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="EW_BA_STATUS_BLESS">Bless</LSTag>. This can stack with other sources of <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLESS">Bless</LSTag>.

Creature is Bleeding profusely, taking an additional [2] Slashing damage at the start of each turn and has Disadvantage on Constitution Saving Throws. Vulnerable to Poison and Acid damage.

Removed by healing.

This weapon has exceptional balance. Roll a <LSTag Tooltip="DifficultyClass">DC</LSTag> 20 <LSTag Tooltip="Dexterity">Dexterity</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> after attacking, on a successful roll raise your <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> by 2 for 1 turn.
Unblockable Flail

The flexible head on this weapon makes it impossible to block properly. When you miss an <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Roll</LSTag>, you may use a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ReactionActionPoint">Reaction</LSTag> to deal [1] regardless.
Overwhelming Force
When you miss an <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Roll</LSTag>, you may use a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ReactionActionPoint">Reaction</LSTag> to deal [1] regardless.
Rending Blows
This weapon heavily damages enemy armour on hits, reducing the target's <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> by 2 until their next turn.
Armour Penetration
This weapon easily defeats armour. Melee attacks ignore Piercing <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> and have +1 to their <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Roll</LSTag>.
Deep Wounds
This weapon causes extreme internal damage on a good hit. Increases the damage of <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hits</LSTag> by 5.
Disarming Chain
Possbily disarm your target by wrapping the flail around their weapon unless they succeed a <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag>.
Rend
<LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> is reduced by [1] until next turn.
Can Crusher
Victims of attacks from this weapon take an extra 2 damage if they are wearing metal armour.
Defensive Parry

This sword's long blade and hilt allow for effective defense. You may use a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ReactionActionPoint">Reaction</LSTag> to parry an incoming melee attack and reduce its damage by 2d6 + Your <LSTag Tooltip="ProficiencyBonus">Proficiency Bonus</LSTag>. 2-Turn Cooldown.
Argument. Solved.

On <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hits</LSTag>, infects target with an evil poison that saps their very life-force. Target takes 1d8 poison damage per turn and has <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag>, <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Ability Checks</LSTag>, and <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>. Lasts 3 turns.
Nimble Defense

This weapon has exceptional balance. Roll a <LSTag Tooltip="DifficultyClass">DC</LSTag> 20 <LSTag Tooltip="Dexterity">Dexterity</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> after attacking, on a successful roll raise your <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> by 2 for 3 turns.
You attacked your target with exceptional balance, raising your <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> by 2 for 1 turn.
Razor Sharp

This weapon's edge is sharp enough to cut your very soul. On <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hits</LSTag>, applies <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="HEAVY_BLEEDING">Heavy Bleeding</LSTag> to target for 3 turns.
Bloody Spikes

This weapon is covered in spikes which tear flesh apart. On <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hits</LSTag>, applies <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="HEAVY_BLEEDING">Heavy Bleeding</LSTag> to the target for 3 turns.
Heavy Bleeding

Takes [1] at the start of each turn and has Disadvantage on Constitution Saving Throws.

When you recieve healing you must succeed a Constitution Saving Throws to cure the bleeding.
Argument. Solved.

Target has <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag>, <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Ability Checks</LSTag>, and <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>. Additionally, target takes 1d8 poison damage per turn
Extremely Long
Pikes are especially long weapons, boasting the furthest reach of all melee weapons. Useful for supporting allies from relative safety.
Heavy Draw

This bow has an especially heavy draw weight. Both your <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag> and <LSTag Tooltip="Dexterity">Dexterity</LSTag> are important to be effective with this weapon. <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag> and Damage rolls receive a [1] bonus. The <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Roll</LSTag> bonus for <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag> is capped at [2], however, the damage bonus is uncapped.
Mighty Overdraw

You draw the bow way further than normal for a mighty shot that hits with extreme force, at the cost of accuracy. Take a [1] <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Roll</LSTag> penalty in exchange for an extra [2].
Ease of Use
Crossbows utilize a buttstock and trigger assembly making them far easier to aim than bows and increase <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag> made with them by [1].
Marksman's Focus

You calm yourself and take careful time with your shot. Spend [1] of <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">Movement Speed</LSTag> to gain <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> and reduce the <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hit</LSTag> threshhold by -4, for this attack. This effect can stack with <LSTag Tooltip="ImprovedCritical">Improved Critical</LSTag>.
Rapid Fire

You take multiple arrows in your hand and take a steady stance, preparing an onslaught for your foes. Spend 9m of <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">Movement Speed</LSTag> to shoot 3 different targets at once, at reduced damage.
Skirmisher Tactics
Shortbows are light and handy, perfect for hit and run skirmishing. Landing a hit gives you 2m of <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">Movement Speed</LSTag>.
Skirmishing
Shortbows are light and handy, perfect for hit and run skirmishing. Landing a hit gives you 2m of <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">Movement Speed</LSTag>.
Overdraw
[1] penalty to your next ranged <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Roll</LSTag> in exchange deal an extra [2].
Marksman's Focus

Gain <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> and reduce the <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hit</LSTag> threshhold by -4, for this attack. This effect can stack with <LSTag Tooltip="ImprovedCritical">Improved Critical</LSTag>.
Heavy Armour Movement Speed Penalty

Reduces <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">Movement Speed</LSTag> by [1] if your <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag> is 13 or lower while wearing Heavy Splint, Ring Mail or Chain Mail Armour and 15 or lower while wearing Heavy Plate Armour.
Shadowblade Used
You must wait until you have
You have <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourProficiency">Armour Proficiency</LSTag> with Heavy Armour and increased one <LSTag Tooltip="Abilities">Ability</LSTag> by 1.
You gain <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourProficiency">Armour Proficiency</LSTag> with Heavy Armour and increase one <LSTag Tooltip="Abilities">Ability</LSTag> by 1.

When attacking with a melee weapon you are <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">Proficient</LSTag> with and are wielding in both hands, <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag> take a [1] penalty, but their damage increases by 1d4+[2].
Dispel the sphere of shimmering force an ally cast on you.

Make a pillar of divine fire roar down from the heavens like the wrath of affronted angels. Potentially Burns targets, fiends and undeads receive Holy Burns instead.

Allows you to cast Flamestrike Remembrance and Flamestrike Echo in your following turns.
Can recast an echo of <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="SYR_Target_FlameStrike_Recast_5A">Flamestrike Remembrance</LSTag>.

You have <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on your next <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag> on the current turn, the <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> is lost upon <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">moving</LSTag>.

You give yourself <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on your next <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag> on the current turn, the <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> is lost upon <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">moving</LSTag>.
Dream Shield

Kept from death's door by a brief magical boost. Gained [1] <LSTag Tooltip="TemporaryHitPoints">temporary hit points</LSTag>, <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="Wisdom">Wisdom</LSTag>, <LSTag Tooltip="Intelligence">Intelligence</LSTag>, <LSTag Tooltip="Charisma">Charisma</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag> and magic can't put you to Sleep.

You gain [1] after a <LSTag Tooltip="LongRest">Long Rest</LSTag>. Until the <LSTag Tooltip="TemporaryHitPoints">temporary hit points</LSTag> expire you also have <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="Wisdom">Wisdom</LSTag>, <LSTag Tooltip="Intelligence">Intelligence</LSTag>, <LSTag Tooltip="Charisma">Charisma</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag> and magic can't put you to Sleep.

The entity can't take <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ReactionActionPoint">Reactions</LSTag> and can only take either an <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ActionPoint">Action</LSTag> or a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="BonusActionPoint">Bonus Action</LSTag> and loses all <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">Movement</LSTag> when they do so.

Psychically lash out at [1] creature(s), possibly preventing them from taking <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ReactionActionPoint">Reactions</LSTag> and limiting it to using <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ActionPoint">Action</LSTag> or a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="BonusActionPoint">Bonus Action</LSTag> which also expends all <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">Movement</LSTag>.

Deal only half damage with weapon attacks that use <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag> or <LSTag Tooltip="Dexterity">Dexterity</LSTag>. <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag>, <LSTag Tooltip="Dexterity">Dexterity</LSTag> and <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>. <LSTag Tooltip="Vulnerable">Vulnerable</LSTag> to Necrotic damage.

Weaken a foe - they deal half damage with weapon attacks using <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag> or <LSTag Tooltip="Dexterity">Dexterity</LSTag>. They also have <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag>, <LSTag Tooltip="Dexterity">Dexterity</LSTag> and <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag> and <LSTag Tooltip="Vulnerable">Vulnerable</LSTag> to Necrotic damage. The spell chains to [1] secondary target(s).
Cambion's Cauteriser
This halberd slashes with burning fury dealing an additional [1], but only for its Devil master.

A wicked moment, person, or thing that cannot be slain by sword or spell haunts your mind and flickers in your peripheral vision. You carry it wherever your adventure takes you - or perhaps it carries you.

Your experiences have granted you Expertise in Intimidation, and Darkvision.

When you kill an enemy or score a Critical Hit, all nearby enemies must succeed a Constitution Saving Throw or suffer Bleeding for 2 turns.

Once per long rest, when reduced to 0 Hit Points, the Dark Urge seizes control, pulling you back from the brink of death. You recover [1], but without succeeding a Wisdom Saving Throw you may lose yourself to its will, seeking violence upon any around you.

Once per long rest, when reduced to 0 <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">Hit Points</LSTag>, the Dark Urge seizes control, pulling you back from the brink of death. You recover [1], but without succeeding a <LSTag Tooltip="Wisdom">Wisdom</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> you may lose yourself to its will, seeking violence upon any around you.

Your staff, club, javelin, spear, trident or mace becomes magical: it deals [1], adding your <LSTag Tooltip="SpellcastingAbilityModifier">Spellcasting Ability</LSTag> to its <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag> and <LSTag Tooltip="">Damage Rolls</LSTag>.
The righteous blade of Helm, precisely where it belongs; buried through the chest of the wicked and the monstrous.
During the Time of Troubles, Helm was forced to slay the goddess Mystra as she tried to return home. Something in this sword's unrelenting line speaks to that grief - a duty completed, at any cost.
Landing an attack on a target heals allies for [1] in a [2] radius around you. This effect can only occur once per turn.

You have <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag> against spells. This weapon deals an additional [1] to targets <LSTag Tooltip="Concentration">Concentrating</LSTag> on a spell.
You gain a +3 bonus to Initiative Rolls and have <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on Perception <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Checks</LSTag>.
You gain an additional +[1] to <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> when <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SHIELD_OF_FAITH">Shield of Faith</LSTag> is active.
Faithguard
Entity has an additional +[1] to <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> from <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SHIELD_OF_FAITH">Shield of Faith</LSTag> being active.
Rupture the earth, causing debris to tear through all nearby enemies, dealing [1], and an additional [1] to knocked <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PRONE">Prone</LSTag> creatures.

When you make a <LSTag Tooltip="RangedWeaponAttack">ranged weapon attack</LSTag>, it gains a +[1] bonus to the <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Roll</LSTag> and deals additional damage equal to half your <LSTag Tooltip="Dexterity">Dexterity</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityModifier">Modifier</LSTag> (rounded down). The bonus damage can only occur once per turn.

The cloak infuses your projectile with the piercing force of a hawk's talons. Your <LSTag Tooltip="RangedWeaponAttack">ranged weapon attacks</LSTag> against creatures within [1] of you do an additional [2] damage based off the type of ranged weapon used. This effect can only occur once per turn.

At the start of combat, the crossbow activates, causing bolts of magical energy to lash out. For 3 turns, whenever a creature damages you with an attack, the attacker takes [1]. This can only occur once per turn.

Activate the staff to gain <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="SorceryPoint">Sorcery Points</LSTag> equal to half your Charisma <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityModifier">Modifier</LSTag>, rounded up. This effect can only occur once per <LSTag Tooltip="LongRest">Long Rest</LSTag>.

When you cast a spell and spend at least 1 <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="SorceryPoint">Sorcery Point</LSTag>, you gain a bonus to your <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Spell Attack Rolls</LSTag> and <LSTag Tooltip="SpellDifficultyClass">Spell Save DC</LSTag> equal to half the spell level cast, rounded up. This bonus lasts 1 turn. This effect can only occur once per turn.
Instantly regain a number of <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="SorceryPoint">Sorcery Points</LSTag> equal to half your Sorcerer level, rounded up.
While <LSTag Tooltip="Concentration">Concentrating</LSTag>, you gain a +[1] bonus to Constitution <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>.

The amulet floods your being with raw magical energy, allowing you to draw upon its infinite reserves of <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="SorceryPoint">Sorcery Points</LSTag>. You can only use this effect once per turn, and once you do, you take [1]. (Metamagic ability needs to be active.)
Sorcerous Sand Charge
Endless Well Charge

In moments of dire need, you clench your fist. A divine spark answers within the gauntlets, allowing you to cast your next spell of up to 4th level without expending a <LSTag Tooltip="SpellSlot">Spell Slot</LSTag> or <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ChannelDivinity">Channel Divinity</LSTag>.

Unleash a spark of celestial lightning in a [1] radius around you. Each creature in the area must make a <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> or take [2]. On a save, targets still take half damage.
Heal a target for [1] and remove <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">Blindness</LSTag> and any diseases.

The wearer and allies within [1] deal an additional [2] damage with <LSTag Tooltip="MeleeWeaponAttack">melee weapon attacks</LSTag>, and all damage received is reduced by [2]. This bonus is equal to the wearer's <LSTag Tooltip="Wisdom">Wisdom</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityModifier">Modifier</LSTag> minus 1.
Entity deals an additional [1] damage with <LSTag Tooltip="MeleeWeaponAttack">melee weapon attacks</LSTag> and takes [1] less damage from all sources.

Grant a protective stonelike hide to all allies in the targeted area, giving them <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage but reducing their <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">movement speed</LSTag> by [1].
When you use your <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ChannelOath">Channel Oath</LSTag>, you have a [1]% chance to not expend the charge.

The symbol emits light in a [1] radius, dispelling any darkness. You and all allies who are within this aura reduce the number needed to <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">roll</LSTag> a <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hit</LSTag> while attacking by [2], and gain a +[3] bonus to Attack Rolls.

While within the Aura of Everlight, the number you need to <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">roll</LSTag> a <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hit</LSTag> while attacking is reduced by [1] and you gain a +[2] bonus to Attack Rolls.

When you cast <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Smite_Divine">Divine Smite</LSTag>, you gain <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="OO_HEAVENLY_HASTE">Heavenly Haste</LSTag> for 1 turn. This effect can only occur once per combat.

Once per <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>, when you expend a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ChannelOath">Channel Oath</LSTag> charge, your next <LSTag Tooltip="MeleeWeaponAttack">melee weapon attack</LSTag> will deal an extra [1]. If the target fails a Constitution <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag>, they will also be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="STUNNED">Stunned</LSTag> for 1 turn.

Your next <LSTag Tooltip="MeleeWeaponAttack">melee weapon attack</LSTag> will deal an extra [1]. If the target fails a Constitution <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag>, they will also be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="STUNNED">Stunned</LSTag> for 1 turn.
When you use <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ChannelOath">Channel Oath</LSTag>, you have a [1]% chance to not expend the use.

Landing a <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hit</LSTag> with a weapon attack fuels your aggression, causing your next weapon attack to deal an additional [1]. This effect can only occur once per turn.
Attacks with this weapon have a [1]% chance to apply <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="MM_SUNDERED">Sundered</LSTag> for 3 turns.
Entity has it's <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> reduced by -[1].

The amulet's insatiable hunger sinks its teeth into you, forging a shield of dark power from your stolen life force. Until combat ends, you have a bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> equal to half your Charisma <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityModifier">Modifier</LSTag>, rounded up, up to a max of +4.

The amulet's hunger claws at your very being, demanding sacrifice for its power. At the start of combat, you suffer [1] but become armoued with shadowy energy. Until combat ends, you gain a bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> equal to half your Charisma <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityModifier">Modifier</LSTag>, rounded up, up to a max of +4.

The dagger resonates with the eternal nature of your pact, granting you unique benefits that reflect your chosen pact.

Pact of the Blade - While Pact Weapon is active, your weapon deals an additional [1] and you gain Resistance to Psychic damage. This effect can only occur once per turn.

Pact of the Chain - Your familiars gain an additional +[2] to Armour Class and Attack Rolls, in addition to temporary hit points equal to twice your Warlock level.

Pact of the Tome - You gain +[3] to spell Attack Rolls and Spell Save DC, and your cantrips also deal an additonal [4]. This effect can only occur once per turn.

When struck by an enemy, you can sear your foe with a 3rd-level <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_HellishRebuke_3">Hellish Rebuke</LSTag>. This effect can only occur once per <LSTag Tooltip="LongRest">Long Rest</LSTag>.
React to your attacker with a 3rd-level <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_HellishRebuke_3">Hellish Rebuke</LSTag>.

When you land a <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hit</LSTag> while <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="RAGE">Raging</LSTag>, it <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="STUNNED">Stuns</LSTag> the target for 1 turn.

The horn awakens the divine blood within you. While <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="RAGE">Raging</LSTag>, your maximum <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag> are increased by [1] for each of your Barbarian levels.
When you strike with this hammer, there is a [1]% chance that a clap of thunder erupts, dealing [2] to all creatures within [3].

You become a raging embodiment of war itself. While <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="RAGE">Raging</LSTag>, you add half your Strength <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityModifier">Modifier</LSTag> (rounded down) to damage done with <LSTag Tooltip="MeleeWeaponAttack">melee weapon attacks</LSTag>, and all damage taken is reduced by the same amount. Your <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">movement speed</LSTag> is doubled.
When you unleash your fury, your allies share in your resilience. You and all allies within [1] gain <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="RR_TITAN_FORT_BUFF_ALLY">Resilient Rage</LSTag> for [2] turns.
Haunting Tune
You unlock <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="SS_Shout_HauntingTune">Haunting Tune</LSTag> when you have this flute equipped.

The show must go on! Inspired to continue fighting, if you are below 50% <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag> and take damage, you can channel your artistic passion to heal yourself for [1]+[2] <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag>. This effect can only occur once per <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
You deal an additional [1] damage with <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_UnarmedAttack">Unarmed Attacks</LSTag> and gain a +[2] bonus to Unarmed Attack Rolls.
Your <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Projectile_Jump">Jump</LSTag> distance is increased by [1] and your <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">movement speed</LSTag> is increased by [2].

When you land a <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hit</LSTag> with this weapon, the target is <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PARALYZED">Paralyzed</LSTag> for [1] turn. This effect can occur only once per combat.

Unleash the blade's dark energy and attempt to pierce a target's heart. The target must make a Constitution <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> or take [1] for every two Rogue levels you have.
At the start of combat, you gain <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="VV_OPEN_GAMBIT">Calculated Risk</LSTag> for [1] turns.

While in combat and you deal damage with a spell, you have a [1]% chance of being granted a boon for [2] turn based on the damage type dealt. This can only occur once per turn.

Acid: Acidic Form
Thunder: Blurred
Necrotic: False Life
Fire: Heat (for [3] turns)
Lightning: Lightning Charges
Cold: Armor of Agathys
Psychic: Mirror Image
Poison: Envenomed Vitality
Radiant: Shield of Faith
Force: Forceful Repercussion
Gained [1] <LSTag Tooltip="TemporaryHitPoints">temporary hit points</LSTag>

You utter a final incantation, channeling the destructive energies of Netheril through your very being. The ancient runes upon the staff ignite with a flash as you unleash a devastating wave of force energy, obliterating yourself and dealing [1] to all creatures within a [2] radius. At character level 12, this damage increases to [3].

The hawk's keen gaze guides your aim, revealing your prey's vulnerabilities. Targets that have [1]% or fewer <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag> take an additional [2] from <LSTag Tooltip="RangedWeaponAttack">ranged weapon attacks</LSTag>.

Touch a creature within [1] and force them to make a Constitution <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag>. On a failed save, the <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="VV_ASSASSINS_MARK">Mark of Death</LSTag> is applied on them for 10 turns. Your attacks have <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> against the marked creature and your <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hits</LSTag> against the marked creature deal an additional [2] damage.

This creature has been marked for death. The caster who applied this mark has <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">attacks</LSTag> against the marked target and deals an additional [1] damage on <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hits</LSTag> against the marked target.

While your Metamagic ability is active, the amulet floods your being with raw magical energy, allowing you to draw upon its infinite reserves of <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="SorceryPoint">Sorcery Points</LSTag>. You can only use this effect once per turn and you take [1] each time you use it.
War Caster
Usable once per <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag> or once per <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_Wildshape_Panther">Wild Shape</LSTag>.

Deal additional Radiant damage equal to your <LSTag Tooltip="ProficiencyBonus">Proficiency Bonus</LSTag>. On a hit, light erupts on the target, forcing it to make a Constitution <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> or be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">Blinded</LSTag> for 3 turns.
Blessed with the favour of a goddess, Nightsong cannot be permanently killed. When unconscious, she becomes automatically stabilized.
Impervious Defence
All incoming damage is reduced by an amount equal to your <LSTag Tooltip="ProficiencyBonus">Proficiency Bonus</LSTag>.
All incoming damage is reduced by [1].
Allies make this <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> with <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> and Undead make it with <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag>.

Prevented from <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BURNING">Burning</LSTag> and <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> to Fire damage. Lightning and Cold <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attacks</LSTag> have <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> against you.
The wearer deals an additional 1d4 cold damage when dealing psychic damage.

When you deal psychic damage to an enemy with an <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attacks</LSTag>, they must succed a <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="MAG_PSYCHIC_MENTAL_FATIGUE">Mental Fatigue</LSTag>.
The wearer deals an additional [1] when dealing [2] with <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attacks</LSTag>.

When you deal [1] to an enemy with an <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attacks</LSTag>, they must succed a <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> or become <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="POISONED">Poisoned</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: See Invisibility
You gain <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_SeeInvisibility">See Invisibility</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Fireball
You cast <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Projectile_Fireball">Fireball</LSTag> centered on yourself.
Wild Magic: Forceful
Your spells deal an additionl [1] per spell level.
Your weapon <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">attacks</LSTag> deal an additional [1].
Wild Magic: Cheese
You are <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="POLYMORPH_CHEESE">Polymorphed</LSTag> into cheese.
Wild Magic: Confused
Afflicted with <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="CONFUSION">Confusion</LSTag>. You are hostile to everyone, wander around aimlessly, and occasionally skip turns in your stupor.
Wild Magic: Dependable Healing
At the start of your turn regain [1].
Wild Magic: Incapacitated
You are <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="INCAPACITATED">Incapacitated</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Greased
You cast <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Grease">Grease</LSTag> centered on yourself.
Wild Magic: Bad Saving Rolls
All other creatures in a [1] radius of you have <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on all <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>.
Suffers <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on all <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Faerie Fire
Cast <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_FaerieFire">Faerie Fire</LSTag> centered on yourself.
Wild Magic: Summon Spectator
You have summoned a hostile spectator!
Wild Magic: Mind Sanctuary

You have summoned a <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="TAD_MIND_SANCTUARY_AURA">Mind Sanctuary Bubble</LSTag> centered on yourself and can use <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ActionPoint">Actions</LSTag> and <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="BonusActionPoint">Bonus Actions</LSTag> interchangeably.
Wild Magic: Curse of Truth

You are compelled to always tell the truth. You have <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="Deception">Deception</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SkillCheck">Skill Checks</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Banished
You are <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BANISHED">Banish</LSTag> to another plane of existence.
Wild Magic: Maximum Damage
The next spell that hits does maximum damage.
Wild Magic: Static Shock
You become charged with a massive amount of static electricity. When a creature hits you with a melee <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">attacks</LSTag>, you deal [1] to them.
Wild Magic: Healed
You regain [1].
Wild Magic: Charmed
You <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="CHARMED">Charm</LSTag> any creature that hits you with an <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">attack</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Push Back
Any creature that hits you with a melee <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">attacks</LSTag> is pushed back by [1].
Wild Magic: Hearty
You have advantage on all <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag> and <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Ability Checks</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Mass Blink

Yourself and all allies within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> may be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINK">Blinked</LSTag> out of existence at the end of their turns.
Wild Magic: Mass Friends
All non-hostile creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> are afflicted with <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="FRIENDS">Friends</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Headache
You have a distracting headache is making it difficult to think clearly. Your <LSTag Tooltip="Intelligence">Intelligence</LSTag> is reduced by 2.
Wild Magic: Refreshed Spells
You regain all of your expended Level 1 <LSTag Tooltip="SpellSlot">Spell Slots</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Glow Up
Your body starts to glow and emits a light that eliminates darkness within [1].
Wild Surge: Lightning Storm

All other creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> take [2]. Creatures that succeed a <LSTag Tooltip="Dexterity">Dexterity</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> take halved damage.
Wild Magic: Boo!
You are <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="FRIGHTENED">Frightened</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Mass Invisibility
All creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> become <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="INVISIBLE">Invisible</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Stone Skin
You are <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> against Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.
Wild Magic: Mass Poison

All other creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> must succeed on a <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> or becomed <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="POISONED">Poisoned</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Blinding Glow

You glow brightly in a [1]. Enemies within [2] of you become <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="WILD_MAGIC_ATTEMPT_BLINDNESS">Blinded</LSTag>. When this <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="WILD_MAGIC_ATTEMPT_BLINDNESS">Blindness</LSTag> is removed from a creature they become <LSTag Tooltip="Immune">Immune</LSTag> to it.
Wild Magic: Polymorphed
You are <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="POLYMORPH_SHEEP">Polymorphed</LSTag> into a sheep.
Wild Magic: Summon Owlbear
You have summoned a hostile Owlbear.
Wild Magic: Minor Illusion
You have summoned a <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="MINOR_ILLUSION">Minor Illusion</LSTag>.
Wild Action: Unkillable Enemies
All hostile creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> gain <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="DEATH_WARD">Death Ward</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Mass Drain Life

All other creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> take [2], or half as much damage with a successful <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag>. You regain [3] equal to half the total damage dealt.
Wild Magic: Mirror Image
You cast <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_MirrorImage">Mirror Image</LSTag> on yourself.
Wild Magic: Mass Flight
All creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> gain <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="FLY">Flight</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Invisibility
You become <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="INVISIBLE">Invisible</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Revivify
You are able to cast <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Teleportation_Revivify">Revivify</LSTag> until your next <LSTag Tooltip="LongRest">Long Rest</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Big!

All creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> become <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="ENLARGE">Enlarged</LSTag>. They gain <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Ability Checks</LSTag> and <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>, their weapon <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">attacks</LSTag> deal an additional 1d4 damage.
Wild Magic: Small!

All creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> become <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="REDUCE">Reduced</LSTag>. They suffer <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Ability Checks</LSTag> and <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>, their weapon <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">attacks</LSTag> deal 1d4 less damage.
Wild Magic: Piercing Vulnerability
All creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> become <LSTag Tooltip="Vulnerable">Vulnerable</LSTag> to [2].
Wild Magic: Curse of the Clown

You are cursed to become a clown. Your <LSTag Tooltip="Charisma">Charisma</LSTag> is increased by 1, up to a maximum 20, and you have <LSTag Tooltip="Immune">Immunity</LSTag> to <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_HideousLaughter">Tasha's Hideous Laughter</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Extra Action
You gain another <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="ActionPoint">Action</LSTag> until the end of combat.
Wild Magic: Restore Sorcery Points
You regain all expended <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="SorceryPoint">Sorcery Points</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Restore Rage Charges
You regain all expended <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="RagePoint">Rage Charges</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Mass Haste
All other creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> are <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="HASTE">Hastened</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Lock
All doors and chests within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> are temporarily locked.
Wild Magic: Unlock
All mundane locks within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> are unlocked.
Wild Magic: Summon Menagerie
You have summoned a menagerie of familiars.
Wild Magic: Critical Hits
All of your <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attacks</LSTag> are <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hits</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Mind Readers

You can cast <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_DetectThoughts">Detect Thoughts</LSTag>, but others can read your thoughts too. You have <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="Intimidation">Intimidation</LSTag>, <LSTag Tooltip="Deception">Deception</LSTag>, <LSTag Tooltip="Persuasion">Persuasion</LSTag>, and <LSTag Tooltip="Performance">Performance</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SkillCheck">Skill Checks</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Random Vulnerability

At the start of your next turn, all creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> will become <LSTag Tooltip="Vulnerable">Vulnerable</LSTag> to a random damage type.
Wild Magic: Acid Vulnerability
All creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> are <LSTag Tooltip="Vulnerable">Vulnerable</LSTag> to Acid damage.
Wild Magic: Cold Vulnerability
All creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> are <LSTag Tooltip="Vulnerable">Vulnerable</LSTag> to Cold damage.
Wild Magic: Fire Vulnerability
All creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> are <LSTag Tooltip="Vulnerable">Vulnerable</LSTag> to Fire damage.
Wild Magic: Force Vulnerability
All creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> are <LSTag Tooltip="Vulnerable">Vulnerable</LSTag> to Force damage.
Wild Magic: Lightning Vulnerability
All creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> are <LSTag Tooltip="Vulnerable">Vulnerable</LSTag> to Lightning damage.
Wild Magic: Necrotic Vulnerability
All creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> are <LSTag Tooltip="Vulnerable">Vulnerable</LSTag> to Necrotic Damage.
Wild Magic: Explosive Spells

Your <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Spell Attacks</LSTag> deal an additional [1] per spell level in a [2] radius of the target. Creatures that succeed a <LSTag Tooltip="Dexterity">Dexterity</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> take halved damage.
Wild Magic: Petrified
You are <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PETRIFIED">Petrified</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Full Heal
The next time you are healed, you regain all of your missing <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Burning Greed
For every 500 gold you have in your inventory you take [1].
Wild Magic: Summon Percy
Percy the Pacifist

You have summoned Percy, the Pacifist Kobold. Percy can cast the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Sanctuary">Sanctuary</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Heroism">Heroism</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_HealingWord">Healing Word</LSTag> and <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Resistance">Resistance</LSTag> spells.
Curse of Pacifism

If this creature lands an <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">attacks</LSTag>, they explode in a [1] radius, dealing [2] to all entities in the blast. Creatures that succeed a <LSTag Tooltip="Dexterity">Dexterity</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> take halved damage.
Wild Magic: Mass Fear

All creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> must succeed a <LSTag Tooltip="Wisdom">Wisdom</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> or become <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="FEARED">Fearful</LSTag> and <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="DISARM">Disarmed</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Crabs
You have summoned six hostile crabs.
Wild Magic: Summon Bob
You have summoned Bob the Friendly Zombie.
Bob the Friendly Zombie
Wild Magic: Curse of Vampirism

You are cursed with Vampirism! You gain access to <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Bite_Vampire">Bite</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Claws_Vampire">Claws</LSTag> and <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_CharmPerson_Vampire">Charm Person</LSTag>. Your <LSTag Tooltip="Charisma">Charisma</LSTag> increases by 1, up to a maximum of 20.
Wild Magic: Gaseous Form
You are transformed into a <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="GASEOUS_FORM">Gaseous Form</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Rain
A rainstorm starts above you, anything underneath the storm becomes wet.
Wild Magic: Burning Immunity
You become <LSTag Tooltip="Immune">Immune</LSTag> to fire; You are also on fire, and it cannot be put out.
Wild Magic: Storm Sorcerer

You temporarily gain the powers of a Storm Sorcerer. You gain <LSTag Type="Passive" Tooltip="HeartOfTheStorm">Heart of the Storm</LSTag>, and have access to the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Zone_Thunderwave">Thunderwave</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_CreateDestroyWater">Create or Destroy Water</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Zone_GustOfWind">Gust of Wind</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_SleetStorm">Sleet Storm</LSTag>, and <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_CallLightning">Call Lightning</LSTag> spells.
Wild Magic: Random Ability Decrease
At the start of your next turn, one of your <LSTag Tooltip="Abilities">Abilities</LSTag> will temporarily be reduced by 5.
Wild Magic: Strength Decrease
Your <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag> has been decreased by 5.
Wild Magic: Dexterity Decrease
Your <LSTag Tooltip="Dexterity">Dexterity</LSTag> has been decreased by 5.
Wild Magic: Constitution Decrease
Your <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> has been decreased by 5.
Wild Magic: Intelligence Decrease
Your <LSTag Tooltip="Intelligence">Intelligence</LSTag> has been decreased by 5.
Wild Magic: Wisdom Decrease
Your <LSTag Tooltip="Wisdom">Wisdom</LSTag> has been decreased by 5.
Wild Magic: Charisma Decrease
Your <LSTag Tooltip="Charisma">Charisma</LSTag> has been decreased by 5.
Wild Magic: Random Ability Increase
At the start of your next turn, one of your <LSTag Tooltip="Abilities">Abilities</LSTag> will temporarily be increased by 5, up to a maximum of 20.
Wild Magic: Strength Increase
Your <LSTag Tooltip="Strength">Strength</LSTag> has been increased by 5, up to a maximum of 20.
Wild Magic: Dexterity Increase
Your <LSTag Tooltip="Dexterity">Dexterity</LSTag> has been increased by 5, up to a maximum of 20.
Wild Magic: Constitution Increase
Your <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> has been increased by 5, up to a maximum of 20.
Wild Magic: Intelligence Increase
Your <LSTag Tooltip="Intelligence">Intelligence</LSTag> has been increased by 5, up to a maximum of 20.
Wild Magic: Wisdom Increase
Your <LSTag Tooltip="Wisdom">Wisdom</LSTag> has been increased by 5, up to a maximum of 20.
Wild Magic: Charisma Increase
Your <LSTag Tooltip="Charisma">Charisma</LSTag> has been increased by 5, up to a maximum of 20.
Wild Magic: Mass Disarm
All other creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> are <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="DISARMED">Disarmed</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Mass Charm

All enemies within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> must succeed a <LSTag Tooltip="Wisdom">Wisdom</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> or become <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="CHARMED">Charmed</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: A Helpful Hand
All allies within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> are <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Help">Helped</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Freedom of Movement
All creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> gain <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="FREEDOM_OF_MOVEMENT">Freedom of Movement</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Unstable Blood
Your blood is highly flammable and will explode when it comes in contact with fire.
Wild Magic: Irresistible Dance

All enemies within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> are afflicted with <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="IRRESISTIBLE_DANCE">Otto's Irresistible Dance</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Summmon Friendly Spectator
You have summoned a friendly spectator.
Wild Magic: Temporary Genius

Your <LSTag Tooltip="Intelligence">Intelligence</LSTag> is temporarily increased by 4. Following a <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>, this benefit ends and your <LSTag Tooltip="Intelligence">Intelligence</LSTag> is instead reduced by 2. Either condition is removed following a <LSTag Tooltip="LongRest">Long Rest</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Armour Up
You gain 15 <LSTag Tooltip="TemporaryHitPoints">temporary hit points</LSTag>.
Wild Magic: Heroes' Feast
You cast <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_HeroesFeast">Heroes' Feast</LSTag> centered on yourself.
Wild Magic: Mass Wild Magic Surge

All creatures within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> trigger a <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> at the beginning of their next turn.
Wild Magic: Mass Polymorph

All enemies within [1] of the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout__WildMagic">Wild Magic Surge</LSTag> must succeed a <LSTag Tooltip="Wisdom">Wisdom</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="POLYMORPH_SHEEP">Polymorphed</LSTag> into sheep.
